title: The Lakehouse Idea
summary: Why choose between a cheap, flexible data lake and a reliable, structured warehouse? The lakehouse merges both into one system — a single, governed home for all your data, for both BI and AI.

context.headline: Lake plus warehouse, in one
context.description: For years, companies juggled two systems: cheap, flexible data lakes and reliable, structured warehouses. The lakehouse fuses them. Data sits in cheap, open cloud storage, but gains warehouse-grade reliability and structure on top. Organized as bronze, silver, and gold layers and governed by Unity Catalog, it becomes a single source of truth for everyone.
context.when: From two separate systems to one unified architecture
